steps.title: Use the recognition clue
steps.content: The sentence says other researchers readily responded to Valdez's work as groundbreaking, and that this recognition came from her convincing demonstration. The blank needs a verb meaning recognized or accepted.

steps.title: Reject mismatched verbs
steps.content:
• Choice B means made certain, which does not fit how researchers responded to her work.
  • Choice C means refused to accept, the opposite of "recognition."
  • Choice D means undervalued, also contradicting "groundbreaking."
The remaining choice means recognized. The answer is A.
